## Legal / data-source review

- [ ] This change adds no third-party material or external data; or every item
      is classified as training/distillation, benchmark, runtime retrieval, or
      community example and its provenance is documented.
- [ ] Every training/distillation artifact is approved in
      `data/training/source-registry.json`; no benchmark or issue content is
      silently reused for training.
- [ ] I have authority to submit my contribution under the Unlicense and have
      identified all third-party material, licenses, notices, naming
      obligations, provider terms, and source revisions.
- [ ] The change contains no secrets, leaked/proprietary material, unauthorized
      paid or access-controlled data, large verbatim copyrighted payload, or
      real personal data.
- [ ] Any safety, privacy, security, regional, or prohibited-use review
      triggered by `LEGAL-COMPLIANCE.md` is recorded.
